title: 'Important upcoming' in My-work
excerpt:
For me and my team, it would be very helpful to see some important deadlines come up in My Work. Would it somehow be possible to add an extra feature/layer in My Work that says ‘Important upcoming’? 
Please see the attac…

posts.author: Steven1 (Steven)
posts.cookedHtml:
For me and my team, it would be very helpful to see some important deadlines come up in My Work. Would it somehow be possible to add an extra feature/layer in My Work that says ‘Important upcoming’?

Please see the attachment to see what I had in mind!

Untitled design (11) (1)1080×1080 215 KB

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Steven!

We currently have the later category that displays in My Work which accounts for those upcoming tasks?

You could then also utilise a status column to help indicate the most important/high priority tasks within that category. Is this something that could work for you? Feel free to elaborate further on what else you’d like to see

posts.author: Steven1 (Steven)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bianca,

I apologize for the delay in my response.

I wanted to let you know that the secondary priority column can tackle this for us.

Thanks a lot for your response

Kind regards,
Steven
